description_long: This is a compact MIDI keyboard controller, likely designed for music production and digital audio workstations. The keyboard features 25 velocity-sensitive keys in a two-octave layout, with a combination of black and white keys. On the left side, there are several control pads, buttons, and rotary knobs, as well as a small display and branding in red and white text. The casing is primarily black with a sleek, rectangular profile and rounded edges. The back and sides are solid black, with no visible ports or connectors in these views. The overall design is modern and portable, suitable for use in studios, home setups, or on-the-go music creation.
description: A compact, black MIDI keyboard controller with 25 keys, control pads, and rotary knobs, featuring a modern and portable design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard layout, control pads, buttons, rotary knobs, and branding.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile and thickness of the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid black back panel with no visible controls or connectors.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim profile and thickness.
